data.description:
Repro (verified on installed 0.4.0 == HEAD): rebar help lists 32 subcommands but omits reopen, delete, compact, compact-all, fsck, fsck-recover, revert, resolve, format — all dispatched (rebar:248-581) and all having per-subcommand help. reopen is step 5 of the documented agent loop; fsck is referenced by CLAUDE.md.

Source: src/rebar/_engine/rebar:34-73 (_print_overview).

Fix: add the missing lines; add a guard test asserting every dispatcher case arm has an overview entry (prevents recurrence).
data.title: rebar help overview omits nine routable subcommands incl. workflow-core reopen and fsck
